tables.name: match_result
tables.description: Premier League 2024-25 season match results with scores, teams, and player of the match awards. Contains 45 matches.

columns.name: away_goals
columns.description: Number of goals scored by the away team. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '0', '1', '3'.

columns.name: away_team
columns.description: Name of the away team. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Fulham', 'Bournemouth', 'Chelsea', 'Newcastle', 'Brighton'.

columns.name: date
columns.description: Date of the match in DD/MM/YY format. Type: TEXT. Examples: '31/08/24', '14/09/24', '21/09/24', '17/08/24'.

columns.name: home_goals
columns.description: Number of goals scored by the home team. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '0', '1', '2', '3'.

columns.name: home_team
columns.description: Name of the home team. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Ipswich', 'Everton', 'Bournemouth', 'Fulham'.

columns.name: oid
columns.description: Original match identifier or matchday number. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '24', '23', '38', '43', '4'.

columns.name: player_of_the_match
columns.description: Name of the player awarded Man of the Match. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'L. Delap', 'L. Sinisterra', 'Robert Sánchez', 'E. Smith Rowe', 'K. Mitoma'.

columns.name: player_of_the_match_team
columns.description: Team of the player of the match. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Ipswich', 'Bournemouth', 'Chelsea', 'Fulham', 'Brighton'.
